subcodes.first_line: I testify that the Tree of Sinai in this Revelation doth in truth proclaim that there is none other God but Him, and that the Point [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بان شجره الطور فی هذا الظهور ینطق بالحق بانه لا اله الا هو و ان نقطه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @personal instructions, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
